trade_area_note: Broward hotel / Las Olas–beach spender gravity ↔ ~25–35 mi (~30–45 min rideshare peak) to Hard Rock Stadium (Miami Gardens) for Dolphins + mega-events + 2026 World Cup / concerts. Not collegiate-stadium hugging—use spikes as metro calendar overlay.
primary_university: Florida Atlantic University (FAU Boca Raton main campus)
primary_stadiums_arenas: Hard Rock Stadium — Miami Gardens (NFL Dolphins, concerts, FIFA World Cup 2026 anchor venue, Formula 1 Miami GP)
FAU Stadium — Boca Raton (collegiate football / parents-weekend halo; ~35–45 min Fort Lauderdale CBD per maps agent)
premium_hotel_clusters: Fort Lauderdale Beach oceanfront corridor (Four Seasons Beach, Conrad, Ritz-Carlton Ft. Lauderdale Atlantic, Atlantic Hotel & Spa, Kimpton Shorebreak)
Downtown Las Olas / New River fringe (Hyatt Centric Las Olas, W Fort Lauderdale vicinity, commuter hotels)
high_wealth_corridors: E Las Olas Blvd retail / dine spine (premium street frontage premiums)
Harbor Isles / Coral Ridge waterways (boats + second homes; spillover diners)
17th Street Causeway waterfront office-hospitality corridor (Intl airport / yachts)
collegiate_bar_district_avoid: Pure volume spring-break beach strips north of downtown (seasonal nuisance enforcement risk—police nuisance enforcement history varies by block; verify permits block-by-block)
Cheap shot-bar clusters that compete on cover/drink specials rather than affluent celebration spend (scout Himmarshee late-night competitively—some blocks qualify)
receipts_notes: No Texas-style statewide mixed-beverage gross receipts portal in FL comparable to TX Comptroller. Use landlord/broker OM, comps from recent sales flyers (Crexi/CoStar subscriber data), BeverageJournal/DOT industry lists, Broward zoning special exceptions, Sunbiz filings, permit activity in LauderBuild—low-medium confidence versus TX ladder.
permit_portal_hints: Historic + commercial review exclusions apply for some walk-through permit types—flag before assuming fast bar build timelines
Broward County Code / City Code of Ordinances (Municode) for nuisance / noise investigations
noise_entertainment_search_queries: Fort Lauderdale Special Entertainment Overlay District Chapter 5 licensed establishments hours ordinance C-26-05
Fort Lauderdale amplified music outdoor seating restaurant permit
Broward County noise ordinance amplified entertainment hospitality
City of Fort Lauderdale code compliance noise complaint Community Enhancement 954-828-8000
Florida marine vessel amplified music ordinance 25 feet Fort Lauderdale waterways
metro_event_calendar_hints: https://www.hardrockstadium.com/events/ — Dolphins + stadium concerts + World Cup 2026 slate + F1-associated programming
